name: pr-review
description: Review GitHub pull requests with Claude Code or Codex reviewers on deterministic PR snapshots.

interface.shortDescription: Review GitHub PRs from deterministic snapshots.
interface.longDescription: PR Review gathers GitHub pull request metadata, diffs, prior comments, and repository context into a repeatable snapshot, runs Claude Code or Codex reviewers, validates structured findings, and posts configurable PR comments after user approval.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR and prepare must and should findings for posting.
Review this GitHub PR. Review only and leave the PR unchanged.
Create a quality profile for this repository.
